title: Hellish zombies X Fresh animations
body:
This resource packs adds Fresh animation support to my resource pack "Hellish zombies" and that resource pack adds some very cool things like giving the zombies extra details like horns and a muzzle for all zombie types 

This Resource pack requires EMF and ETF

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) Fresh animations link
